summary: Power Control (Redfish) and Wake-on-LAN features - All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend PowerControlPanel component exists but only displays for devices with Redfish data. Backend APIs working correctly - power actions return 'Connessione rifiutata' as expected since no real iLO is reachable.

issues: PowerControlPanel only visible when device has Redfish data (rf.server_model, rf.power_watts, or rf.ilo_firmware). Since no real iLO is reachable, Redfish data is not populated and PowerControlPanel is not shown.

power_action_endpoint: POST /api/devices/{ip}/power-action returns error gracefully when iLO unreachable
POST /api/devices/{ip}/power-action returns 404 when no iLO credential exists
power_state_endpoint: GET /api/devices/{ip}/power-state returns error gracefully when iLO unreachable
GET /api/devices/{ip}/power-state returns 404 when no iLO credential exists
wake_on_lan_endpoint: POST /api/devices/{ip}/wake-on-lan queues command with valid MAC address
POST /api/devices/{ip}/wake-on-lan validates MAC format (400 for invalid)
pending_commands_endpoint: GET /api/connector/pending-commands returns commands with valid API key
GET /api/connector/pending-commands returns 401 for invalid API key
heartbeat_with_pending_commands: Heartbeat response includes pending_commands when WoL is queued
vault_regression: GET /api/redfish/failover-status returns polling mode for iLO devices

critical_code_review_comments: Power control endpoints correctly use Redfish API via redfish_poller.power_action() and get_power_state()
WoL commands are stored in pending_commands collection and marked as 'dispatched' after connector fetches them
Heartbeat endpoint includes pending_commands in response for connector to execute
PowerControlPanel component in DeviceDetailPanel.js has correct data-testid attributes
PowerControlPanel only renders when hasRedfish is true (device has rf.server_model, rf.power_watts, or rf.ilo_firmware)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_power_control_wol.py (new test file for Power Control and WoL features)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (PowerControlPanel not visible without Redfish data - expected behavior)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. WoL commands queued during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Power Control and Wake-on-LAN features fully tested. All 19 backend tests pass. Power action/state endpoints return 'Connessione rifiutata' since no real iLO is reachable (expected). WoL commands are queued in pending_commands collection and included in heartbeat response. PowerControlPanel in frontend only renders when device has Redfish data (hasRedfish = rf.server_model || rf.power_watts != null || rf.ilo_firmware). Since no real iLO is polled, Redfish data is not populated and PowerControlPanel is not visible. This is expected behavior - the panel will appear once a real iLO is polled via Redfish.

mocked_apis.Redfish power-action/power-state: Returns 'Connessione rifiutata' since no real iLO is reachable from this environment

new_endpoints_tested: POST /api/devices/{ip}/power-action - Execute power action (On, ForceOff, GracefulShutdown, ForceRestart)
GET /api/devices/{ip}/power-state - Get current power state via Redfish
POST /api/devices/{ip}/wake-on-lan - Queue WoL command with MAC address
GET /api/connector/pending-commands - Connector fetches pending WoL commands
wol_flow: 1. Admin calls POST /api/devices/{ip}/wake-on-lan with MAC address
2. Command stored in pending_commands collection with status='pending'
3. Connector heartbeat includes pending_commands in response
4. Commands marked as 'dispatched' after connector fetches them
5. Connector executes WoL magic packet on LAN
frontend_features: Confirmation dialog before executing power actions
